cast.name: 保罗·霍利伍德 Paul Hollywood

this_title: The Great British Baking Show: Holidays Season 8 Season 8
trans_title: 英国烘焙大赛：节日特辑 第八季
introduction: The holidays aren't the same without a yuletide return to the cozy wonderland of The Great British Baking Show. Season 8 of the baking hit's seasonal spinoff will likely hit Netflix this December, with hosts Alison Hammond and Noel Fielding welcoming back beloved former contestants as Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their festive bakes.
chinese_title: 英国烘焙大赛：节日特辑 第八季
foreign_title: The Great British Baking Show: Holidays Season 8 Season 8
